headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on O'Reilly Automotive, Raises Price Target to $110
summary: Mizuho  analyst David Bellinger   maintains O'Reilly Automotive (NASDAQ:ORLY) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $105 to $110.
